name: 3-bet pot QhJhTs wet broadway
description: Same wet broadway straight-ladder board as spot_007 but in a 3-bet pot (pot=180, eff=910). Tight ranges interact very heavily with this board: every BB 3-bet holds at least one card that plays; BTN's range has many hands that either smashed or got completely negated. Tests the nervous system of the solver: SPR around 5, lots of made-hand / draw combinations. Hero = BB, villain = BTN.

input.hero_range: TT, JJ, QQ, KK, AA, AJs, AQs, AKs, AQo, AKo, KQs, A5s, A4s, A3s, A2s
input.villain_range: QQ, KK, AA, AKs, AKo, A5s, A4s, KQs

expected_notes: Populated by differential run. Expect many all-in rivers in this spot. Good stress test for SPR handling — the solver must see the remaining stack and prefer bigger bet sizes than on spot_007.
